comm_style: composed and reflective under pressure; detail-oriented and organised; strong bias toward action and initiative; connects over substance rather than surface; course-corrects calmly rather than getting defensive
current_focus: high-stakes infrastructure consolidation at Lloyds; Life Admin side project (privacy-first, multilingual NHS GP form auto-fill); civic-navigation agent for a hackathon; NatWest graduate offer accepted as a floor while scanning the 2027 landscape; Professional Cloud Architect certification in progress
vibe_summary: builds tools that help disoriented people navigate bureaucratic walls — Life Admin for NHS forms, a citizen-navigation agent for fragmented public services — while grinding through Berserk-tier moral complexity and Iran geopolitics; calm under pressure, action-biased, explicitly not status-driven; wants a peaceful life near water and connects over substance, not networking theater
